missing_items: B-rep geometry (requires FreeCAD runtime STEP export or external `aieng import-step` before topology extraction)
coverage_categories.notes: Offline FCStd parsing does not produce STEP geometry. The source FCStd is preserved under provenance/source.fcstd.

missing_items: stable face/edge/body IDs (requires `aieng extract-topology --backend occ` on a STEP export)

coverage_categories.notes: Object names and types lifted directly from FCStd Document.xml.

inferred_items: Object IDs are slug-derived from FCStd names; they are not stable across renames and are not confirmed CAD stable references.
Feature types inferred from FCStd object name/type via regex heuristics; treat all as candidates requiring engineer review.
Numeric FCStd property values lifted as parameter proposals.
missing_items: Non-numeric, computed, and constrained parameters not extracted.

coverage_categories.notes: Reference converter does not inspect FCStd assembly structure.

missing_items: Material assignments not extracted by the reference converter.
Load definitions not present in FCStd Document.xml.
Boundary condition definitions not present in FCStd Document.xml.
Mesh not generated; run an external mesher on exported geometry.
No solver deck present; provide externally if needed.
CAD-to-CAE mappings not established; requires geometry and mesh first.

inferred_items: parameter_source and writeback_strategy recorded for all feature candidates.
coverage_categories.notes: Parameters are proposals only. The converter does not execute edits or regenerate geometry.
L5 writeback metadata (roundtrip rebuild strategy) is not emitted by the reference converter. A future FreeCAD scripted-rebuild adapter would be required.

notes: Original FCStd archive preserved for traceability.
Converted from FCStd source via freecad_reference (runtime_mode=offline).
No solver, mesher, optimizer, or CAD edit was executed by the converter.

uncertainty_notes.description: Feature feat_plate was classified as 'base_plate' from FCStd object name 'Plate' / type 'Part::Box'. Treat as candidate, not confirmed truth.
Feature feat_mountinghole_1 was classified as 'mounting_hole' from FCStd object name 'MountingHole_1' / type 'PartDesign::Hole'. Treat as candidate, not confirmed truth.
Feature feat_mountinghole_2 was classified as 'mounting_hole' from FCStd object name 'MountingHole_2' / type 'PartDesign::Hole'. Treat as candidate, not confirmed truth.
Feature feat_flange_top was classified as 'flange' from FCStd object name 'Flange_Top' / type 'PartDesign::Pad'. Treat as candidate, not confirmed truth.

unsupported_or_missing.description: Offline FCStd parsing cannot produce stable face/edge/body IDs. Run aieng extract-topology --backend occ on a STEP export to reach L1.
FCStd Document.xml does not carry simulation setup; provide it externally if needed.
FreeCAD material data was not extracted by the reference converter; provide externally if needed.
Protected regions must be provided by the engineer; not inferred from FCStd alone.
Reference converter does not emit writeback strategy metadata at L5.
